title: Dreamy Creamy Turkish Goose Pilaf
description: A yeasty and creamy Turkish dish featuring goose fat and bonito flakes, perfect for a energizing meal. This raw-friendly pilaf is a unique twist on traditional Turkish cuisine.
instructions: Heat the melted goose fat in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the turkish rice and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the yeast, bonito flakes, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Remove from heat and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
